title: Otohime’s Hope Counters Hatred
description: On pages 9–12, this part follows Unknown person #1, Narrator, Fish-Man Island Citizens, King Neptune, Jinbe, Fisher Tiger, Queen Otohime. The core story beat is otohime’s hope counters hatred.
scene: The scene centers on otohime’s hope counters hatred, with Unknown person #1, Narrator, Fish-Man Island Citizens, King Neptune, Jinbe, Fisher Tiger, Queen Otohime driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: So depending on what you say next...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I may not be able to forgive you!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: BELLEMERE- SAN!!! You can't die!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's true, jimbel- san... the pain we caused to that girl is something we can never alone for...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: As long as we live...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: A map of the world, huh...? That I can't wait to see!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: I guess that makes this map of the island the first step towards your dream!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: It's a pleasure to meet you all, filthy humans!!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: From this day onwards, this island belongs to us!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: DIE FOR YOUR WORTHLESS LOVE.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Bellemere- SAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We ain't got no food for a filthy human brat like you!! GyaHahah!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: So shut up and keep drawing those maps!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Grumble

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Scratch

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Write

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A thief!!! That ruffian just stole our treasure!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's a brat!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Like I care!! Shoot to kill!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Take the brat's life!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: DRIP DRIP

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: seven...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ... million to go...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: tremble

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Oh, look... you're back already...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Not that you have a choice...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Welcome home... our carto-grapher.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Shaha Hahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahah...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Remember that the company

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that must have been very difficult for you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Don't talk like it's got nothing to do with you!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That's right. No matter what happens, I have no intention of feeling any compassion towards arlong.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: However...

dialogue.speaker: Rayleigh
dialogue.text: Until I arrived at the Sabaody archipelago two years ago...

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: I had no idea that a race as powerful as the fishmen had suffered persecution at the hands of humans.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But when we were pursuing those slave traders who had captured came... I saw something that made me doubt my own eyes.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It hit me as soon as I set foot in Sabaody park.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It was the spitting image...

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: ...of the "Arlong park" that they had constructed on our island!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...nyuuuu... We all idolised that place...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm not saying this to earn your forgiveness, Nami...!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: Arlong- San Hated Humans bitterly, resented them above all else...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And what we did was truly wrong... but still...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: even arlong felt that same longing, ever since he was a child, to be part of that world.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Up until two hundred years ago, Fishmen and Merfolk were officially consi- dered types of "fish"...

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: Then, two hundred years ago, the Ryuguk kingdom became a part of the world government...

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: The King was granted a place on the reverie World Council, and we took the first steps towards peace with humanity...

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: But the humans never stopped hating us.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The most horrible period that I can remember in my lifetime...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...was the beginning of the great pirate age...!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: The terror caused by the human pirates running rampant on this island...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...stays with me even to this day...!!

summary: Otohime’s Hope Counters Hatred. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
